Ad Creative Library

Complete pre-launch ad copy library for B2B property managers and B2C homeowners, organized by category and audience segment

Ad Creative Library

This document contains the complete pre-launch advertising copy for HeyZack, organized by audience segment (B2B and B2C) and ad category.

Voice Guidelines: See Brand Voice & Tone for detailed guidance on messaging calibration.

B2B Ad Library

Target Audience: Property Managers & Hospitality Operators
Voice: Data-driven, Professional, ROI-focused (The Helpful Peer)
Total Variants: 39 ads across 8 categories

Category 1: Problem/Agitation

Ad #1: The Vendor Hostage Situation

Platform: LinkedIn | Audience: Property Managers, 35-55, managing 10+ properties

ElementContent
HeadlineStill Paying $85K Per Building for “Smart” Systems?
BodyTraditional BMS vendors quoted you $85K for installation. Then held you hostage with $15K annual “support” fees. Every change requires a $3K service call. You’re managing 20+ properties with fragmented systems that don’t talk to each other. There’s a better way. Portfolio-scale building automation at 95% lower cost. One dashboard. Every property. Complete control.
CTAGet Early Access Pricing →
ImageSplit-screen: frustrated PM with multiple tablets (left) vs. relaxed PM with single dashboard (right)

Ad #2: The 2 AM Emergency Call

Platform: Facebook | Audience: Property Managers, Facility Directors

ElementContent
HeadlineAnother 2 AM Call: “The Heating’s Not Working”
BodyIt’s 11 PM. You’re finally asleep. Phone rings: “Building C is freezing, tenants are complaining.” You can’t adjust the thermostat remotely. Can’t see system status. You’re driving across town at midnight. What if AI detected the issue before tenants complained? What if you could fix it from your phone in 90 seconds? Portfolio operators are cutting after-hours emergencies by 70% with predictive building automation.
CTASee How It Works →

Ad #3: The Energy Bill Shock

Platform: Google Display | Audience: Cost-conscious property managers

ElementContent
Headline$47K in Wasted Energy Last Quarter. Here’s Why.
BodyHeating empty units. Cooling vacant spaces. HVAC running at full blast while properties sit unoccupied. No visibility into which buildings are bleeding costs. Property managers like you are saving 20-30% on utilities by letting AI handle energy optimization across their entire portfolio.
CTACalculate Your Savings →

Ad #4: The Scaling Nightmare

Platform: LinkedIn | Audience: Growing property management companies

ElementContent
HeadlineYou Grew from 15 Properties to 40. Your Stress Grew 10x.
BodyEvery new building means another system to learn. Another vendor relationship. Another app to juggle. Your portfolio doubled, but your operational complexity exploded exponentially. Top-performing property operators manage 50+ buildings as easily as competitors manage 20. Here’s their secret.
CTALearn Their Strategy →

Ad #5: Guest Experience Gamble (Hospitality)

Platform: Facebook | Audience: Hospitality operators, boutique hotel managers

ElementContent
Headline”Room Was Too Cold” — There Goes Your 5-Star Rating
BodyGuest checks out. Leaves the AC running at 62°F all day. You’re air conditioning an empty room for 8 hours, burning $15 in utilities. Next guest arrives to a freezing room. One-star review: “Climate control was terrible.” Boutique hotels are solving this with guest-triggered automation. Check-in triggers pre-conditioning. Checkout triggers energy savings. Guests are delighted. Owners see 35% lower utility bills.
CTASee Hotel Case Study →

Category 2: Solution/Benefit

Ad #6: One Dashboard, Unlimited Properties

Platform: LinkedIn | Audience: Property Managers actively managing portfolios

ElementContent
HeadlineWhat If You Could See All 30 Buildings from One Screen?
BodyReal-time energy usage. Climate status. Occupancy data. Security alerts. All properties, one unified dashboard. Adjust any thermostat from your phone during owner meetings. Get predictive alerts before systems fail. Generate ROI reports with one click. HeyZack delivers portfolio-scale automation at consumer prices. $5K per building (not $85K). DIY installation. No service contracts. No vendor lock-in.
CTARequest Demo Access →

Ad #7: AI That Actually Learns

Platform: Google Display | Audience: Tech-forward property managers

ElementContent
HeadlineStop Programming Schedules. Let AI Learn Your Buildings.
BodyHeyZack’s AI learns actual occupancy patterns. Detects seasonal shifts. Predicts optimal heating/cooling windows. Energy savings improve automatically over time: 15% month one → 22% month three → 28% month six. No rules to write. No schedules to maintain. Just measurable savings that prove themselves.
CTASee AI in Action →

Ad #8: The 95% Cost Reduction

Platform: LinkedIn | Audience: Budget-conscious property managers, CFOs

ElementContent
Headline$85K or $5K? Same Building Automation, 95% Lower Price.
BodyTraditional BMS: $85,000 installation + $15,000/year maintenance. HeyZack: $5,000 installation + $0/year maintenance. Same portfolio-scale centralized control. Same energy optimization. Same commercial-grade reliability. No vendor lock-in. No service contracts. DIY installation. Your ownership will ask why you didn’t switch sooner.
CTACalculate Your ROI →

Category 3: Social Proof

Ad #11: Portfolio Patricia Case Study

Platform: LinkedIn | Audience: Property managers seeking peer validation

ElementContent
HeadlineHow Patricia Cut Operating Costs 28% Across 30 Buildings
BodyPatricia manages 30 multi-family buildings across three cities. She was drowning in vendor relationships, fragmented systems, and 2 AM emergency calls. 6 months with HeyZack: ✓ Operating costs down 28% ✓ After-hours emergencies down 70% ✓ Onboarded 8 new properties in 2 hours each ✓ Tenant satisfaction scores up 19%. “I manage 40 buildings now as easily as I managed 15 before.”
CTARead Full Case Study →

Ad #12: Boutique Hotel Energy Savings

Platform: Facebook | Audience: Hospitality operators, hotel owners

ElementContent
Headline35% Lower Utility Bills. 4.7-Star Reviews. Same Staff.
BodyHugo runs 5 boutique hotels (78 rooms total). 3 months with HeyZack: ✓ Utility bills down 35% ($18K annual savings) ✓ Review scores jumped from 4.2 to 4.7 stars ✓ Zero climate-related guest complaints ✓ Remote management across all properties. “Guests think we upgraded to luxury HVAC. We just made our existing systems intelligent.”
CTASee Hotel Results →

Ad #14: Numbers That Matter

Platform: Google Display | Audience: Data-driven decision makers

ElementContent
Headline487 Property Operators. $2.3M in Proven Savings.
BodyReal data from actual HeyZack deployments: → 487 property operators across 12 states → 8,400+ buildings under management → $2.3M in documented energy savings (last 12 months) → 23% average cost reduction per property → 4.8/5.0 operator satisfaction rating → 92% would recommend to peers
CTAJoin Early Access List →

Category 4: Feature Focus

Ad #16: Portfolio Dashboard Deep Dive

Platform: LinkedIn | Audience: Detail-oriented property managers

ElementContent
HeadlineEvery Building. Every System. One Screen.
BodySee what’s happening across your entire portfolio in real-time: → Live energy consumption per building → Climate status across all units → Occupancy detection and patterns → Predictive maintenance alerts → Cost savings tracking (daily/weekly/monthly) → System health monitoring. Drill down into individual buildings, floors, or units.
CTAExplore Dashboard Features →

Ad #17: Predictive Maintenance Intelligence

Platform: Google Display | Audience: Maintenance-focused property managers

ElementContent
HeadlineFix Problems Before Tenants Notice
BodyHeyZack detects anomalies that signal upcoming failures: → HVAC cycling 40% more frequently than baseline? Compressor issue likely. → Energy consumption spiking in Building M? System inefficiency detected. Get alerts with recommended actions. Schedule preventive maintenance. Avoid $12K emergency replacements.
CTASee Detection Examples →

Category 5: Objection Handling

Ad #21: “Too Good to Be True?”

Platform: LinkedIn | Audience: Skeptical prospects

ElementContent
HeadlineWe Know. You’ve Heard These Promises Before.
BodyEvery BMS vendor claims their system will “revolutionize operations.” Then you pay $85K and get disappointing results. We get your skepticism. That’s why we offer: ✓ 30-day money-back guarantee ✓ Pilot program (deploy in 1-2 buildings first) ✓ ROI guarantee: If you don’t see 15% energy savings in 90 days, full refund ✓ Zero contract lock-in
CTAStart Risk-Free Pilot →

Ad #22: “DIY = Unreliable?”

Platform: LinkedIn | Audience: Enterprise-minded managers

ElementContent
HeadlineDIY Installation. Enterprise Reliability.
Body”DIY sounds unprofessional.” Here’s reality: → Commercial-grade components (IP65, -20°C to 60°C operation) → Bank-level encryption security → 99.7% uptime SLA available → Enterprise support tier with 4-hour response → Matter protocol certified. DIY refers to installation (no $50K labor fees), not reliability.
CTAReview Technical Specs →

Category 6: Comparison

Ad #26: HeyZack vs. Traditional BMS

Platform: LinkedIn | Audience: PMs researching alternatives

Traditional BMSHeyZack
✗ $50K-$85K installation per building✓ $2K-$8K installation per building
✗ $15K/year mandatory maintenance✓ $0/year mandatory fees
✗ 3-6 month deployment timeline✓ 2-hour deployment per building
✗ Vendor lock-in & service contracts✓ DIY control, no contracts

CTA: Compare Full Features →

B2C Ad Library

Target Audience: Tech-Savvy Homeowners, Energy-Conscious Consumers, Safety-Focused Families
Voice: The Knowledgeable Friend (friendly, reassuring, intelligent-but-not-technical)
Total Variants: 39 ads across 7 categories

Category 1: Problem/Agitation

Ad 1.1: The App Hell Problem

Platform: Facebook, Instagram | Persona: Tyler (Tech-Savvy)

ElementContent
HeadlineTired of Seven Different Smart Home Apps?
BodyYou’re not crazy. Smart homes have been a mess. Seven apps. Three voice assistants that don’t talk to each other. Automations that mysteriously stop working after updates. HeyZack finally fixes this. One app controls everything—cameras, locks, climate, lighting, sensors. Works with devices you already own. No ecosystem lock-in. Setup takes 30 minutes.
CTAJoin the waitlist → Get early bird pricing

Ad 1.2: The False Alarm Nightmare

Platform: Facebook, Google Display | Persona: Sarah (Safety-Focused)

ElementContent
HeadlineAnother 2 AM False Alarm. Again.
BodyYour cat walked by. Your kid opened a window. The wind blew. Your phone buzzes, your heart races, you check the camera… nothing. Forty alerts per day. Two at 2 AM. You’ve started ignoring them—which defeats the entire purpose of having security. HeyZack’s AI learns what’s normal in your home. Only real threats, no noise.
CTAReserve your spot → Early bird 30% off

Ad 1.3: The Energy Bill Shock

Platform: Facebook, Google Display | Persona: Emma (Energy-Conscious)

ElementContent
HeadlineYour Energy Bill Went from $140 to $210. But Why?
BodyYou’ve replaced every bulb with LEDs. You bought a smart thermostat. You nag your kids about turning off lights (they don’t listen). And your bill keeps climbing. HeyZack shows you exactly where every dollar goes—room by room, device by device. Then automates the fixes. Average savings: $47/month. No nagging required.
CTAGet early access → Start saving immediately

Ad 1.4: The “Learning” That Doesn’t Learn

Platform: Reddit, Instagram | Persona: Tyler (Tech-Savvy)

ElementContent
HeadlineYour Nest “Learned” the Wrong Schedule. Again.
BodyMarketing promised: “AI that learns your habits.” Reality delivered: Timers disguised as intelligence. Your thermostat thinks you’re gone at 2 PM on Thursdays—but you work from home Thursdays now. It’s been four months. Still hasn’t figured it out. That’s not AI. That’s just… bad scheduling software. HeyZack actually learns behavioral patterns.
CTAReserve early bird pricing → Launching soon

Category 2: Solution/Benefit

Ad 2.1: The One App Promise

Platform: Instagram, Facebook | Persona: Tyler (Tech-Savvy)

ElementContent
HeadlineOne App. No Monthly Fees. Actually Learns Your Habits.
BodyControl everything from one place. Finally. HeyZack connects cameras, locks, climate, lighting, sensors, curtains—128 products across 15 categories. Works with devices you already own (Nest, Ring, Philips Hue, etc.). No ecosystem lock-in. Genuine AI learning—not just timers. Setup takes 30 minutes. Core features work forever with zero subscriptions.
CTAReserve early bird spot → 30% off launch price

Ad 2.2: The Energy Savings Dashboard

Platform: Facebook, Google Display | Persona: Emma (Energy-Conscious)

ElementContent
HeadlineSave $47/Month on Average. See Exactly How.
BodyFinally: visibility into where your energy dollars actually go. HeyZack monitors every room, every device, in real time. Shows you that the basement fridge is consuming 3x normal. That your HVAC cycles inefficiently when heating empty rooms. Then automates the fixes. Payback in 14-18 months. Then it’s pure profit.
CTAGet early access → Start tracking now

Ad 2.3: The Peace of Mind System

Platform: Facebook, Google Display | Persona: Sarah (Safety-Focused)

ElementContent
HeadlineKnow Your Family Is Safe. Wherever You Are.
BodyOne app shows everything that matters: security cameras (live), door locks (status), smoke/CO detectors (armed), water leak sensors (dry), motion sensors (activity patterns). Smart alerts only notify genuine issues—no more false alarms. Bedtime report: “All doors locked. All windows closed. No safety alerts.”
CTAReserve your spot → Protect what matters

Category 3: Social Proof

Ad 3.1: The Tech Reviewer Quote

Platform: Reddit, Instagram, Facebook | Persona: Tyler (Tech-Savvy)

ElementContent
Headline”HeyZack Is What SmartThings Should Have Been”
BodyTech reviewer verdict after 90-day test: “Tried HomeKit (limited devices), SmartThings (constant bugs), Google Home (strategy chaos), and Home Assistant (part-time job maintaining it). HeyZack finally delivered: universal compatibility, stable automations, actual AI learning, and—shockingly—it just works. Three months in, zero automations have broken. Energy bill dropped 23%.” — Marcus Chen, Smart Home Tech Reviews (47K subscribers)
CTASee full review → Reserve early bird pricing

Ad 3.2: The Energy Savings Testimonial

Platform: Facebook, Google Display | Persona: Emma (Energy-Conscious)

ElementContent
Headline”We’re Saving $62/Month. HeyZack Paid for Itself in 16 Months.”
Body”I tracked our energy bill obsessively for two years trying everything—LEDs, smart thermostat, nagging my teenagers about lights. Bill dropped maybe $18/month. Installed HeyZack in January. By March, bill was down $62/month consistently. The app showed me our basement fridge was dying and our HVAC was heating empty rooms all day.” — Jennifer M., Columbus, OH
CTAJoin waitlist → Calculate your savings

Ad 3.3: The Non-Tech Spouse Approval

Platform: Facebook, Instagram | Persona: Tyler + Sarah (Cross-Appeal)

ElementContent
Headline”My Wife Actually Likes Our Smart Home Now”
Body”I’m a software engineer. I’ve rebuilt our smart home four times—HomeKit, SmartThings, Google, custom Home Assistant setup. My wife tolerated it. Barely. With HeyZack, she uses it daily. Voice commands that actually work. Scenes that don’t randomly break. Her exact words: ‘This is the first smart home thing you’ve done that doesn’t make me want to throw it out the window.’” — David L., Seattle
CTAReserve early bird → The spouse test awaits

Category 4: Feature Focus

Ad 4.1: Universal Compatibility

Platform: Reddit, Instagram | Persona: Tyler (Tech-Savvy)

ElementContent
HeadlineWorks With Nest. Ring. Philips Hue. Ecobee. Everything.
BodyWiFi. Zigbee 3.0. Bluetooth. Matter. IR control. All supported. You’ve already invested in smart devices. HeyZack works with what you own: Nest/Ecobee thermostats, Ring/Arlo cameras, Philips Hue lights, August/Yale locks, IKEA smart home products, 1,000+ devices from 200+ brands. No forced ecosystem replacement. No vendor lock-in.
CTACheck compatibility → Reserve early pricing

Ad 4.3: Intelligent Alert System

Platform: Facebook, Instagram | Persona: Sarah (Safety-Focused)

ElementContent
HeadlineOnly Real Alerts. No More False Alarms.
BodyLearns Normal (Weeks 1-2): • Delivery person arrives 2-4 PM weekdays → Normal • Neighbor’s dog walks by daily → Normal. Alerts Only Anomalies (Week 3+): • Unexpected person at back door, 11 PM → ALERT ✗ Regular delivery person → No alert ✗ Cat walking by camera → No alert. Peace of mind through intelligence, not notification spam.
CTAReserve early bird → Stop false alarm fatigue

Category 5: Objection Handling

Ad 5.1: Subscription Cost Anxiety

Platform: Facebook, Google Display | Persona: Emma (Cost-Conscious)

ElementContent
HeadlineNo Monthly Fees. Core Features Work Forever.
BodyFree Forever: Automation, local control, voice integration, energy monitoring, mobile app access, firmware updates. Compare: Ring: $10/month per camera ($120/year). Nest Aware: $6-12/month. ADT monitoring: $45/month ($540/year). HeyZack core features: $0/month, $0/year, $0 forever.
CTASee pricing → Reserve early bird discount

Ad 5.2: Technical Intimidation

Platform: Facebook | Persona: Sarah (Non-Technical)

ElementContent
Headline”I’m Not Technical.” Perfect—Neither Is HeyZack Setup.
BodyThe Process: 1. Plug in hub (like plugging in WiFi router) 2. Download app (like any app download) 3. Scan QR code on device 4. Follow app prompts 5. Done. No tools. No wiring. No technical terms. No electrician. Proof: 72-year-old grandmother did it in 28 minutes (video on our site).
CTAWatch setup video → Reserve your spot

Category 6: Comparison

Ad 6.2: vs. Nest (Google)

Platform: Facebook, Google Display | Persona: Emma (Energy-Focused)

NestHeyZack
AI learning for thermostat onlyAI learning for entire home
Controls 40-50% of energy useWhole-home energy monitoring
8-12% savings typical15-30% savings typical
Single device focusUnified platform

CTA: Calculate your savings → Reserve early access

Ad 6.4: vs. Home Assistant

Platform: Reddit | Persona: Tyler (Power User)

ElementContent
HeadlineHome Assistant’s Power Without the Weekend Maintenance
BodyWhat You Loved: ✓ Infinite customization ✓ Local control ✓ No vendor lock-in ✓ Open protocols. What Broke You: ✗ YAML configuration hell ✗ Integration updates that break everything ✗ Partner’s exact words: “Can we just have normal lights?” HeyZack: Power user features + consumer simplicity + spouse acceptance factor = 10/10
CTARecover your weekends → Reserve now

Creative Brief Summary

Key Messages by Audience

AudiencePrimary Pain PointKey MessageProof Point
B2B Property Managers$85K BMS + vendor lock-in95% cost reduction, portfolio-scale control28% energy savings, 70% fewer emergencies
B2B HospitalityGuest complaints + energy wasteZero-touch automation, 35% utility reduction4.2→4.7 star reviews
B2C Tech-Savvy7+ fragmented appsOne unified platform with real AIZero broken automations in 90 days
B2C Energy-ConsciousUnexplained high bills$47/month average savings16-month payback period
B2C Safety-FocusedFalse alarm fatigueAI that learns what’s normal2 AM false alarms eliminated

For implementation guidance and A/B testing recommendations, refer to the source documents.
